title: Membership - Lululemon
snippet:
| Benefits | Collective Up to $500 | Plus Up to $1000 | Pinnacle $1000+ |
 ---  --- |
| Early Access to Product Drops |
| Free Hemming |
| Exchange or Credit on Sale Items |
| Receipt-Free Returns |
| Member-Only Experiences |
| Partner Perks |
| Select Peloton Classes |
| Exclusive Access to Products |
| Personal Shopper |
| First Access to Restocks |
| Complimentary Customization |

The door’s open. Step into more.

You’ve seen the benefits. Now make them yours. Sign up before your next order to start leveling up right away.

JOIN NOW

Membership’s great. The app makes it better.

The lululemon App makes it easy to shop, unlock exclusive and early access to product drops, and get the most out of your membership—wherever you are.

DOWNLOAD THE APP

## Membership FAQs [...] Level 1 – Collective

 Free to join.

Level 2 - Collective Plus

 Unlocks at $500 in yearly spend.

Level 3 - Collective Pinnacle

 Unlocks at $1000 in yearly spend.

What spend is included and excluded from counting towards my level progression?  (Click to Expand)

Yearly spend includes lululemon merchandise purchases (net of discounts and returns) made at lululemon stores in the US and Canada and on the lululemon website and app.

Your membership account must be used at the time of purchase to count towards your yearly spend.

Purchases of gift cards, purchases made on third party sites, taxes, shipping, and other fees do not count towards your yearly spend.

What benefits do I get at each level?  (Click to Expand)

#### Collective [...] \Benefits are only for lululemon Membership members and conditions and exclusions apply. lululemon Membership program criteria, eligibility and benefits are subject to availability and change. See the full lululemon Membership Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.

classification.summary: Lululemon has launched a tiered membership program offering exclusive benefits and perks based on annual spending, aiming to enhance customer engagement and loyalty. The program includes tiered levels with increasing benefits, emphasizing brand exclusivity and personalized experiences.
